assessor_1_raw: E-commerce transformer ranker: well-designed experiment. IPW for position bias correction is the standard Unbiased LTR approach. Temporal split prevents catalog leakage. Human annotation sanity check adds calibration value. NDCG@10 is appropriate for ranking quality. Per-frequency-decile NDCG detects non-uniform improvement. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: The design correctly applies IPW to both training and evaluation labels. The human annotation validation set is properly isolated from model training. Temporal split with frequency stratification is appropriate. LambdaMART baseline with equivalent tuning is a fair comparison point. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Strong e-commerce search ranker experiment. IPW position bias correction is the right approach for implicit feedback. Review text inclusion as transformer-specific feature is the key hypothesis test. Bootstrap CIs stratified by frequency decile is comprehensive. Scope correctly notes that online A/B testing is needed for business impact claims. Verdict: defense_wins.
adjudication_raw: All three assessors unanimous: defense_wins. Consistent evaluation.
